positive: Stylized illustration of a crescent moon and nebula backdrop, featuring a minimalist geometric arrangement of interconnected stars and cosmic dust. The primary subject is a single, majestic stylized bear silhouette standing confidently among the stellar elements. Use a highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo, royal purple, electric cyan, and shimmering gold accents. The style should be vector art mixed with celestial etching, with clean lines, crisp silhouettes, and a strong central composition. Flat design elements should combine with fine-line engraving details for depth, ensuring the final print is highly legible and optimized for apparel placement. No complex gradients, maintaining solid color blocks and sharp boundaries for print transfer.
